title: Smart Water Bottle Generalization Evidence Plan
purpose: Show how the same AutoDirector Agent pipeline applies to a neutral product-launch brief without public-figure news assumptions.

allowPackageWhen: final video exists and media probe matches 9:16 target
asset manifest contains either generated product visuals or explicit user-upload/public-source assets
voice-screen map covers every narration line
package includes source project, manifest, script, citations or source notes, render log, and quality report
blockPackageWhen: image provider is unavailable and no uploaded/public product visual exists
render falls back to pure text cards without visual evidence
caption blocks overlap essential UI or product visuals
artifact chain skips any upstream Agent handoff

notes: This is intentionally a source-level review fixture, not a fake completed video.
The hosted v10 Musk/Altman delivery remains the media proof; this fixture proves the same workflow is not topic-locked.
